name: com.jonathan-dodds.singletons
description:
An implementation of the Singleton programming pattern for your Unity project.

A singleton is a type of object that acts as a single point of governance for game system, typically implemented using a script with a static field assigned on Awake.

This singletons package provides a more robust solution with configurable behaviour for each type.

Check out the GitHub page to contribute or report an issue: https://github.com/JDoddsNAIT/Singletons
